Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Waveriders]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Waveriders are Kameira of the sea that can command the motion of water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Waveriders are mounts used by the Am’haranai that have natural powers over water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — A Waverider is a creature waiting at the dock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — A Waverider is a creature or entity that can be mounted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — A Waverider is associated with the Mason.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Shera imagines a hidden bay filled with Waveriders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Waveriders travel by docks.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Waverider is a method of transport back to the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Lucan and Shera could snare Waveriders.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
